calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Roger E. Jackson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Centurion Bank.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Del Ray Cross.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $27,103.37
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $659.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $27,762.87
Judgment signed in open court.
